CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2012 Continued To Mar-23-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Date For Hearing On Default Judgment Prove Up And Order
Off Calendar Jan-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for plaintiff(s) American Express Bank FSB, Federal Savings Bank.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Kenny Liu aka Kenny C. Liu aka Chao Ying Liu, ind. and dba Diamond 98 Cents Club for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $46,480.06
Costs - $580.00
Total judgment in the amount of $47,060.06

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Date For Hearing Ond Efault Judgment Prove-Up
